methods.method_name: Establishment of an Optimized Murine Asthma Model
methods.description: This method describes the process of establishing a murine model for Humulus pollen allergy using different sensitization routes and doses, followed by asthma induction and various measurements to assess the model's effectiveness.

steps.description: Forty mice were randomly divided into four groups.
steps.searchable_summary: randomly divide mice into groups

steps.description: Mice in the SC sensitization group were sensitized via SC injection on the back of the neck with 25 μg of HSE adsorbed to alum adjuvant in a volume of 200 μl.
steps.searchable_summary: sensitize mice via SC injection with HSE and alum

steps.description: Mice in the IP sensitization group were sensitized via IP injection with 300 μg of HSE adsorbed to alum adjuvant in a volume of 200 μl.
steps.searchable_summary: sensitize mice via IP injection with HSE and alum

steps.description: Mice in the IP control group received IP injections of PBS adsorbed to alum adjuvant (200 μl).
steps.searchable_summary: inject control mice with PBS and alum

steps.description: Sensitization injections were administered at weekly intervals for 3 weeks.
steps.searchable_summary: administer injections weekly for 3 weeks

steps.description: To induce asthma, sensitized and control mice were challenged daily via the airways with aerosolized 1% HSE or saline for 7 consecutive days.
steps.searchable_summary: challenge mice with aerosolized HSE or saline

steps.description: Airway hyperresponsiveness to methacholine was measured 24 h after the last challenge.
steps.searchable_summary: measure airway hyperresponsiveness to methacholine

steps.description: On day 29, mice were anesthetized and sera were obtained for measurement of specific IgE levels.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sera for IgE measurement

steps.description: Bronchoalveolar lavage fluid was prepared from the right lung for inflammatory cell enumeration and cytokine quantitation.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare BALF for cell enumeration and cytokine quantitation

steps.description: Paraffin sections from the left lung were used for histological assessment.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare lung sections for histology

steps.description: The spleen was homogenized for cytokine measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: homogenize spleen for cytokine analysis

methods.description: This method outlines the statistical procedures used to analyze the experimental data, including the use of SPSS software for variance analysis and t-tests to determine significance.

steps.description: Data are presented as mean ± SE of the mean (SEM).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate mean and SEM for data presentation

steps.description: All statistical analyses were performed using SPSS Statistics, version 19.0.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis using SPSS

steps.description: Analysis of variance and Student's t-test were used to assess differences between groups.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct ANOVA and t-tests for group comparisons

steps.description: Differences with p < .05 were regarded as statistically significant.
steps.searchable_summary: determine statistical significance with p < .05

steps.description: All experiments were performed independently three times with similar results.
steps.searchable_summary: validate results through independent repetition

methods.description: This method describes the ELISA procedure used to measure allergen-specific serum IgE levels in mice.

steps.description: Wells of microtiter plates were coated with HSE and reference wells with anti-mouse IgE capture antibody.
steps.searchable_summary: coat ELISA plates with HSE and capture antibody

steps.description: Plates were blocked and washed, then serum samples were applied to sample wells.
steps.searchable_summary: block, wash, and apply serum to ELISA wells

steps.description: Biotinylated monoclonal anti-mouse IgE antibody and horseradish peroxidase-streptavidin were applied.
steps.searchable_summary: apply detection antibodies to ELISA plates

steps.description: TM Blue substrate was applied, and reactions were developed.
steps.searchable_summary: develop ELISA reactions with TM Blue substrate

steps.description: Plates were read at 450 nm using an ELISA plate reader.
steps.searchable_summary: read ELISA plates at 450 nm

methods.description: This method describes the ELISA procedure used to measure allergen-specific serum IgG2a levels in mice.

steps.description: Plates were coated with HSE and reference wells with anti-mouse IgG2a.
steps.searchable_summary: coat ELISA plates with HSE and IgG2a antibody

steps.description: Plates were blocked and washed, then serum samples were added to HSE-coated wells.
steps.searchable_summary: block, wash, and apply serum to ELISA wells

steps.description: Alkaline phosphatase-labelled goat anti-mouse IgG2a was applied.
steps.searchable_summary: apply detection antibodies to ELISA plates

steps.description: 4-nitrophenyl phosphate substrate was added, and absorbance was measured.
steps.searchable_summary: develop ELISA reactions with 4-nitrophenyl phosphate substrate

steps.description: Absorbance at 450 nm was measured 1 h after the addition of substrate.
steps.searchable_summary: read ELISA plates at 450 nm
